method: COMMENT_EVALUATION 2026-06-03 (researcher-approved). M46=Abundance (wealth); peace does not belong. Route reg-117 peace pointers + legacy peace tier-synthesis to M33 (Peace); adopt contentment finding 39 into M46-D. Secondary cross-cluster links preserved on routed items.

new_observations.title: Learned contentment as inner condition independent of circumstances
new_observations.description: Both contentment terms name a stable inner condition independent of circumstances — a learned/acquired disposition. Adopted into M46 (Abundance), sub-group M46-D 'The inner life beyond material circumstance', from legacy DIMENSION_REVIEW finding id 39 (reg 29).
